              /* Push OceanWP sticky header below banner + keep it above the banner layer */
              .rtt-has-banner .oceanwp-sticky-header,
              .rtt-has-banner .site-header,
              .rtt-has-banner #site-header {
                  z-index: 10000 !important;

                  position: fixed;
                  width: 100%;
                  top: var(--rtt-banner-height, 0px) !important;
              }
              /* If theme uses a different sticky selector, this keeps regular header from jumping */
              .rtt-has-banner body {
                  --rtt-banner-height: 0px;
              }
            </style>

            <script>(function(){var banner=document.getElementById("rtt-adfree-banner");if(!banner)return;document.documentElement.classList.add("rtt-has-banner");function setBannerHeight(){var h=banner.offsetHeight||0;document.documentElement.style.setProperty("--rtt-banner-height",h+"px")}
setBannerHeight();window.addEventListener("resize",setBannerHeight)})()</script>

</li><li id="menu-item-669573825909" class="menu-item menu-item-type-custom menu-item-object-custom menu-item-669573825909"><a href="https://www.readthetale.com/recipes-for-kids" class="menu-link"><span class="text-wrap">Recipes for Kids</span></a></li><li id="menu-item-669573824143" class="menu-item menu-item-type-taxonomy menu-item-object-category menu-item-has-children dropdown menu-item-669573824143 nav-no-click"><a href="https://www.readthetale.com/parenting-tips" class="menu-link"><span class="text-wrap">For Parents<i class="nav-arrow fa fa-angle-down" aria-hidden="true" role="img"></i></span></a>

	<li id="menu-item-669573824147" class="menu-item menu-item-type-custom menu-item-object-custom menu-item-669573824147"><a href="https://www.readthetale.com/parenting-tips/behavior-discipline" class="menu-link"><span class="text-wrap">Behavior &#038; Discipline</span></a></li>	<li id="menu-item-669573824148" class="menu-item menu-item-type-custom menu-item-object-custom menu-item-669573824148"><a href="https://www.readthetale.com/parenting-tips/learning-development" class="menu-link"><span class="text-wrap">Learning &#038; Development</span></a></li>	<li id="menu-item-669573824149" class="menu-item menu-item-type-custom menu-item-object-custom menu-item-669573824149"><a href="https://www.readthetale.com/parenting-tips/health-wellbeing" class="menu-link"><span class="text-wrap">Health &#038; Wellbeing</span></a></li>	<li id="menu-item-669573824460" class="menu-item menu-item-type-custom menu-item-object-custom menu-item-669573824460"><a href="https://www.readthetale.com/parenting-tips/parenting-challenges" class="menu-link"><span class="text-wrap">Parenting Challenges</span></a></li>	<li id="menu-item-669573822874" class="download-app-link menu-item menu-item-type-custom menu-item-object-custom menu-item-669573822874"><a href="#" class="menu-link"><span class="text-wrap">Download</span></a></li></ul>
</li><li><a href="/login/">🔑 Login</a></li><li class="search-toggle-li" ><a href="https://www.readthetale.com/#" class="site-search-toggle search-header-replace-toggle"><span class="screen-reader-text">Toggle website search</span><i class=" fas fa-search" aria-hidden="true" role="img"></i></a></li></ul>

			<main id="main" class="site-main clr" role="main">

				

<header class="page-header background-image-page-header">

	
	<div class="container clr page-header-inner">

		
			<h1 class="page-header-title clr">Bedtime Stories</h1>

			
		
		
	</div><!-- .page-header-inner -->

	<span class="background-image-page-header-overlay"></span>
	
</header><!-- .page-header -->


	
	<div id="content-wrap" class="container clr">

		
		<div id="primary" class="content-area clr">

			
			<div id="content" class="site-content clr">

				
				
<article class="single-page-article clr">

	
<div class="entry clr">

	
	<div class="wpb-content-wrapper"><div class="vc_row wpb_row vc_row-fluid wpb_animate_when_almost_visible wpb_bounceIn bounceIn vc_row-o-content-middle vc_row-flex"><div class="wpb_animate_when_almost_visible wpb_bounceInDown bounceInDown wpb_column vc_column_container vc_col-sm-12"><div class="vc_column-inner"><div class="wpb_wrapper">
	<div class="wpb_raw_code wpb_raw_html wpb_content_element" id="Random_Fun_fact">
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 20px;">
 <div id="fun-fact-box" style="padding: 10px 20px; border-radius: 10px; text-align: center;">
    <span style="color: red; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;">Fun Fact:</span>
    <span id="fun-fact" style="font-weight: normal;"></span>
  </div>

  <button id="new-fact-btn" 
          style="margin-top: 15px; background-color: #ff6b6b; color: white; border: none; padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; font-weight: bold; transition: 0.2s;">
    Show Another Fun Fact
  </button>
</div>

<style>
@keyframes slideInRight { from { transform: translateX(80px); opacity: 0; } to { transform: translateX(0); opacity: 1; } }
@keyframes slideInLeft { from { transform: translateX(-80px); opacity: 0; } to { transform: translateX(0); opacity: 1; } }
@keyframes slideInDown { from { transform: translateY(-60px); opacity: 0; } to { transform: translateY(0); opacity: 1; } }
@keyframes slideInUp { from { transform: translateY(60px); opacity: 0; } to { transform: translateY(0); opacity: 1; } }
@keyframes fadeIn { from { opacity: 0; } to { opacity: 1; } }

#fun-fact {
  display: inline-block;
}
</style>

<script>
  const funFacts = [
"Did you know? Octopuses have three hearts and blue blood! Two hearts pump blood to the gills, and one pumps it to the rest of the body.",

"Did you know? A group of flamingos is called a 'flamboyance'! They're named that because of their bright color and social nature.",

"Did you know? Bananas are berries, but strawberries aren't! It's all about how the fruit forms and where the seeds are.",

"Did you know? Sloths can hold their breath longer than dolphins! They slow their heart rate to stay underwater for up to 40 minutes.",

"Did you know? Butterflies can taste with their feet! Their taste sensors are located on their toes to help find the right plants.",

"Did you know? Koalas have fingerprints just like humans! They're so similar, they could confuse crime scene investigators.",

"Did you know? A day on Venus is longer than a year on Venus! It spins very slowly while orbiting the Sun faster.",

"Did you know? Honey never spoils! Archaeologists have found pots of it in ancient tombs that are still good to eat.",

"Did you know? Sea otters hold hands while they sleep! It helps them stay together and not drift away in the water.",

"Did you know? Wombat poop is cube-shaped! The shape keeps it from rolling away, helping them mark their territory.",

"Did you know? A narwhal’s 'horn' is actually a giant tooth! It can grow up to 10 feet long and has millions of nerve endings.",

"Did you know? Cows have best friends and get stressed when they're apart! They're more relaxed when with their pals.",

"Did you know? Elephants can't jump! They're the only mammals that can't get all four feet off the ground at once.",

"Did you know? Frogs drink water through their skin! They absorb it from ponds and moist surfaces.",

"Did you know? Penguins propose with pebbles! Male penguins find smooth stones to impress a potential mate.",

"Did you know? A snail can sleep for three years! They do this when the weather gets too dry to stay safe.",

"Did you know? Sharks existed before trees! They've been swimming in the oceans for over 400 million years.",

"Did you know? Giraffes only need 30 minutes of sleep a day! They take quick naps standing up to stay alert.",

"Did you know? Bats always turn left when exiting a cave! It's a weird quirk of their flying habits.",

"Did you know? Starfish can regrow their arms! Some species can even regrow an entire body from just one arm.",

"Did you know? The Eiffel Tower can grow taller in summer! Heat makes the metal expand by several inches.",

"Did you know? A single bolt of lightning is five times hotter than the surface of the sun! It can reach 30,000°C.",

"Did you know? Your bones are stronger than steel! They can handle a lot of pressure before breaking.",

"Did you know? Cats can't taste sweetness! Their taste buds don't have the right sensors.",

"Did you know? Peanuts aren't nuts! They're legumes and grow underground like beans.",

"Did you know? The heart of a blue whale is as big as a small car! It can weigh over 400 pounds.",

"Did you know? Ants don't sleep! They have rest periods, but they never fully sleep like humans do.",

"Did you know? A crocodile can't stick its tongue out! It's attached to the bottom of its mouth.",

"Did you know? Some turtles can breathe through their butts! They absorb oxygen through blood vessels near the rear.",

"Did you know? The moon smells like gunpowder! At least, that’s what astronauts said after moonwalks.",

"Did you know? Spiders can't chew, so they drink their food! They liquefy it with special juices.",

"Did you know? A group of porcupines is called a 'prickle'! It's a perfect name for these spiky animals.",

"Did you know? There’s a species of jellyfish that can live forever! It resets its life cycle when in danger.",

"Did you know? Cheetahs can’t roar like lions! They chirp, hiss, and purr instead.",

"Did you know? Apples float because they are 25% air! That’s why they’re perfect for bobbing games.",

"Did you know? Some frogs can freeze without dying! They thaw out and hop away when it warms up.",

"Did you know? A hippo’s sweat is red! It acts as a natural sunscreen and antibiotic.",

"Did you know? There are more fake flamingos in the world than real ones! Lawn decorations outnumber real birds.",

"Did you know? Rain has a smell! It's caused by a chemical called petrichor from the ground.",

"Did you know? Dogs' noses are wet to help them smell better! The moisture traps scent particles.",

"Did you know? Camels have three eyelids! They protect their eyes from desert sand.",

"Did you know? The longest hiccuping spree lasted 68 years! A man named Charles Osborne holds the record.",

"Did you know? Caterpillars have more muscles than humans! They have around 4,000 muscles in their tiny bodies.",

"Did you know? Some fish cough! It helps them clear particles out of their gills.",

"Did you know? A shrimp’s heart is in its head! It’s located right behind the brain.",

"Did you know? The tongue is the strongest muscle in your body, based on size! It works all day helping you eat and speak.",

"Did you know? Crickets hear through their knees! Their ears are located on their front legs.",

"Did you know? Tigers have striped skin, not just striped fur! The pattern goes all the way through.",

"Did you know? The unicorn is the national animal of Scotland! It symbolizes purity and strength.",

"Did you know? A baby puffin is called a 'puffling'! It grows up on sea cliffs before flying out to sea.",

"Did you know? The planet Saturn could float in water! It's mostly made of gas and is very light for its size.",

"Did you know? Flamingos are pink because of the food they eat! Their diet is rich in pink-colored algae and shrimp.",

"Did you know? Mosquitoes are attracted to smelly feet! They like body odor and carbon dioxide.",

"Did you know? Raccoons can open almost anything! They're as skilled as 3-year-old children at figuring out latches.",

"Did you know? Owls can’t move their eyes! Instead, they turn their heads up to 270 degrees.",

"Did you know? The dot over the letter 'i' is called a 'tittle'! It's a fun word for a tiny thing.",

"Did you know? The first oranges weren’t orange! They were green when grown in Southeast Asia.",

"Did you know? A jellyfish is 95% water! That’s why they’re so wobbly and see-through.",

"Did you know? Koalas sleep up to 20 hours a day! Eucalyptus leaves don’t give them much energy.",

"Did you know? Turtles can live longer than humans! Some live well over 100 years.",

"Did you know? A sneeze travels at 100 miles per hour! That’s faster than most cars on a highway.",

"Did you know? A group of frogs is called an 'army'! It's not scary, but very hoppy.",

"Did you know? The world’s largest snowflake was 15 inches wide! It fell in Montana in 1887.",

"Did you know? Ants can lift 50 times their body weight! That’s like a kid lifting a car.",

"Did you know? The tongue of a blue whale weighs as much as an elephant! That’s one heavy tongue.",

"Did you know? Cats have fewer toes on their back paws! They have five in front and only four in back.",

"Did you know? The smallest bone in your body is in your ear! It’s called the stapes and helps you hear.",

"Did you know? Frogs can see in color even in the dark! Their eyes are super sensitive.",

"Did you know? Male seahorses carry the babies! They have a pouch to hold and hatch them.",

"Did you know? The word 'robot' comes from a Czech word meaning forced labor! It first appeared in a play.",

"Did you know? Clouds can weigh more than a million pounds! They float because of warm air below.",

"Did you know? Goldfish can remember things for months! They're smarter than most people think.",

"Did you know? Fireflies glow to talk to each other! They use light to find mates or warn off predators.",

"Did you know? Pigs can’t look up into the sky! Their neck muscles and body shape prevent it.",

"Did you know? The longest recorded flight of a chicken is 13 seconds! That’s about 300 feet.",

"Did you know? Bubbles are always round! Air pressure pushes equally in all directions inside them.",

"Did you know? Kangaroos can’t walk backward! Their muscular tail and legs get in the way.",

"Did you know? You can’t hum while holding your nose! Try it — you need air to make the sound.",

"Did you know? Some worms can have up to 10 hearts! It helps pump blood through their long bodies.",

"Did you know? Baby elephants suck their trunks like pacifiers! It helps them feel comforted.",

"Did you know? The fastest muscle in your body is in your eye! It helps you blink quickly.",

"Did you know? Rainbows are actually full circles! We just see the top half from the ground.",

"Did you know? A goldfish’s memory can last up to five months! They can even recognize their owners.",

"Did you know? A spider’s silk is five times stronger than steel! It’s super light and stretchy too.",

"Did you know? There are more stars in space than grains of sand on Earth! That’s billions and billions.",

"Did you know? The human nose can detect over 1 trillion smells! Our brains are amazing at recognizing them.",

"Did you know? Reindeer eyes change color with the seasons! They go from gold in summer to blue in winter.",

"Did you know? Gorillas burp when they're happy! It’s their way of relaxing after a good meal.",

"Did you know? Lightning strikes Earth about 8 million times a day! That’s a lot of zaps.",

"Did you know? Zebras have unique stripe patterns like fingerprints! No two are exactly alike.",

"Did you know? The brain uses 20% of your body’s energy! Even when you're just sitting still.",

"Did you know? Some butterflies drink turtle tears! It gives them salt they can’t get from plants.",

"Did you know? A baby giraffe falls six feet at birth! But it quickly stands up and walks.",

"Did you know? The wood frog can survive being frozen! It stops its heart and comes back in spring.",

"Did you know? Some spiders dance to impress a mate! They wiggle their legs in fancy moves.",

"Did you know? Cats purr for many reasons, not just happiness! They do it to heal and calm themselves.",

"Did you know? Dolphins call each other by name! They use unique whistles to identify one another.",

"Did you know? The first alarm clock could only ring at 4 a.m.! It was invented in 1787.",

"Did you know? Some mushrooms glow in the dark! It’s called bioluminescence.",

"Did you know? A group of owls is called a parliament! That’s one wise meeting."
 ];

  const animations = [
    'slideInRight 0.6s ease',
    'slideInLeft 0.6s ease',
    'slideInDown 0.6s ease',
    'slideInUp 0.6s ease',
    'fadeIn 0.6s ease'
  ];

  function showRandomFact() {
    const factBox = document.getElementById("fun-fact");
    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * funFacts.length);
    const randomAnimation = animations[Math.floor(Math.random() * animations.length)];

    factBox.style.animation = 'none';
    void factBox.offsetWidth; // reset animation
    factBox.textContent = funFacts[randomIndex];
    factBox.style.animation = randomAnimation;
  }

  // Show random fact when page loads
  showRandomFact();

  // Change fact on button click
  document.getElementById("new-fact-btn").addEventListener("click", function() {
    showRandomFact();

    // Optional: Track click in GA4 if you’re using it
    if (typeof gtag !== 'undefined') {
      gtag('event', 'fun_fact_click', {
        'event_category': 'Engagement',
        'event_label': 'Fun Fact Button',
        'value': 1
      });
    }
  });
</script>
		</div>
	</div>

	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element" >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			
		</div>
	</div>
</div></div></div></div><div class="vc_row wpb_row vc_row-fluid"><div class="wpb_column vc_column_container vc_col-sm-12"><div class="vc_column-inner"><div class="wpb_wrapper">
<div class="vc-zigzag-wrapper zigzag11 vc-zigzag-align-center"><div class="vc-zigzag-inner" style="width: 100%;min-height: 14px;background: 0 repeat-x url(&#039;data:image/svg+xml;utf-8,%3C%3Fxml%20version%3D%221.0%22%20encoding%3D%22utf-8%22%3F%3E%3C%21DOCTYPE%20svg%20PUBLIC%20%22-%2F%2FW3C%2F%2FDTD%20SVG%201.1%2F%2FEN%22%20%22http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2FGraphics%2FSVG%2F1.1%2FDTD%2Fsvg11.dtd%22%3E%3Csvg%20width%3D%2214px%22%20height%3D%2212px%22%20viewBox%3D%220%200%2018%2015%22%20version%3D%221.1%22%20xmlns%3D%22http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg%22%20xmlns%3Axlink%3D%22http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F1999%2Fxlink%22%3E%3Cpolygon%20id%3D%22Combined-Shape%22%20fill%3D%22%23ebebeb%22%20points%3D%228.98762301%200%200%209.12771969%200%2014.519983%209%205.40479869%2018%2014.519983%2018%209.12771969%22%3E%3C%2Fpolygon%3E%3C%2Fsvg%3E&#039;);"></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class="vc_row wpb_row vc_row-fluid"><div class="wpb_column vc_column_container vc_col-sm-12"><div class="vc_column-inner"><div class="wpb_wrapper">
	<div class="wpb_raw_code wpb_raw_html wpb_content_element" >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">

  </iframe>
</div>

	</div>
</div></div></div></div><div class="vc_row wpb_row vc_row-fluid"><div class="wpb_column vc_column_container vc_col-sm-12"><div class="vc_column-inner"><div class="wpb_wrapper">
<div class="vc-zigzag-wrapper zigzag11 vc-zigzag-align-center"><div class="vc-zigzag-inner" style="width: 100%;min-height: 14px;background: 0 repeat-x url(&#039;data:image/svg+xml;utf-8,%3C%3Fxml%20version%3D%221.0%22%20encoding%3D%22utf-8%22%3F%3E%3C%21DOCTYPE%20svg%20PUBLIC%20%22-%2F%2FW3C%2F%2FDTD%20SVG%201.1%2F%2FEN%22%20%22http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2FGraphics%2FSVG%2F1.1%2FDTD%2Fsvg11.dtd%22%3E%3Csvg%20width%3D%2214px%22%20height%3D%2212px%22%20viewBox%3D%220%200%2018%2015%22%20version%3D%221.1%22%20xmlns%3D%22http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg%22%20xmlns%3Axlink%3D%22http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F1999%2Fxlink%22%3E%3Cpolygon%20id%3D%22Combined-Shape%22%20fill%3D%22%23ebebeb%22%20points%3D%228.98762301%200%200%209.12771969%200%2014.519983%209%205.40479869%2018%2014.519983%2018%209.12771969%22%3E%3C%2Fpolygon%3E%3C%2Fsvg%3E&#039;);"></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class="vc_row wpb_row vc_row-fluid"><div class="wpb_column vc_column_container vc_col-sm-12"><div class="vc_column-inner"><div class="wpb_wrapper">
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element" >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<h1 dir="ltr" style="text-align: center;"><span style="color: #99cc00;"> <u> Bedtime Stories of this Month </u></span></h1>
<p style="text-align: center;"><div class="pt-cv-wrapper"><div class="pt-cv-view pt-cv-blockgrid iscvblock iscvhybrid grid1 layout1 cveffect-zoomin pt-cv-round-btn" id="pt-cv-view-713d2cfype"><div data-id="pt-cv-page-1" class="pt-cv-page" data-cvc="4"><div class=" pt-cv-content-item pt-cv-1-col"  data-pid="669573824997"><div class="pt-cv-taxoterm above_title"><a href='https://www.readthetale.com/popular-bedtime-stories' title='Popular Bedtime Stories' class='pt-cv-tax-popular-bedtime-stories'>Popular Bedtime Stories</a><a href='https://www.readthetale.com/bedtime-stories-by-age/4-year-old' title='Stories for a 4-year-old' class='pt-cv-tax-4-year-old'>Stories for a 4-year-old</a><a href='https://www.readthetale.com/bedtime-stories-by-age/5-year-old' title='Stories for a 5-Year-Old' class='pt-cv-tax-5-year-old'>Stories for a 5-Year-Old</a><a href='https://www.readthetale.com/bedtime-stories-by-age/6-year-old' title='Stories for a 6-Year-Old' class='pt-cv-tax-6-year-old'>Stories for a 6-Year-Old</a></div>
<h4 class="pt-cv-title"><a href="https://www.readthetale.com/popular-bedtime-stories/a-city-of-lego" class="_self cvplbd" target="_self" >A City of Lego</a></h4>
<div class="pt-cv-thumb-wrapper  "><a href="https://www.readthetale.com/popular-bedtime-stories/a-city-of-lego" class="_self pt-cv-href-thumbnail pt-cv-thumb-default cvplbd" target="_self" ><img decoding="async" width="600" height="600" src="https://www.readthetale.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/Lego-city-600x600.jpg" class="pt-cv-thumbnail img-rounded" alt="the lego city" srcset="https://www.readthetale.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/Lego-city-600x600.jpg 600w, https://www.readthetale.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/Lego-city-300x300.jpg 300w, https://www.readthetale.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/Lego-city-150x150.jpg 150w, https://www.readthetale.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/Lego-city-768x768.jpg 768w, https://www.readthetale.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/Lego-city.jpg 1024w" sizes="(max-width: 600px) 100vw, 600px" /></a></div>
<div class="pt-cv-content">Danny loved building with Lego. Every day after school, he would rush to his room, pull out his giant box ...<br /><div class="pt-cv-rmwrap"><a href="https://www.readthetale.com/popular-bedtime-stories/a-city-of-lego" class="_self pt-cv-readmore btn btn-success cvplbd" target="_self">Read the Story Here</a></div></div><span style="color:red; font-size:16px; margin-right:5px;">❤️</span>96</div>
<div class=" pt-cv-content-item pt-cv-1-col"  data-pid="669573824909"><div class="pt-cv-meta-fields"><span class="comments-link"> <a href="https://www.readthetale.com/stories-for-kids/series-books/daisy#comments">10 Comments<span class="screen-reader-text"> on Detective Daisy</span></a></span></div>
<div class="pt-cv-taxoterm above_title"><a href='https://www.readthetale.com/stories-for-kids/series-books' title='Series-Books' class='pt-cv-tax-series-books'>Series-Books</a></div>
<h4 class="pt-cv-title"><a href="https://www.readthetale.com/stories-for-kids/series-books/daisy" class="_self cvplbd" target="_self" >Detective Daisy</a></h4>
<div class="pt-cv-thumb-wrapper  "><a href="https://www.readthetale.com/stories-for-kids/series-books/daisy" class="_self pt-cv-href-thumbnail pt-cv-thumb-default cvplbd" target="_self" ><img decoding="async" width="600" height="600" src="https://www.readthetale.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/The-Mysterious-Map-chapter-7-600x600.jpg" class="pt-cv-thumbnail img-rounded" alt="The Mysterious Map" srcset="https://www.readthetale.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/The-Mysterious-Map-chapter-7-600x600.jpg 600w, https://www.readthetale.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/The-Mysterious-Map-chapter-7-300x300.jpg 300w, https://www.readthetale.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/The-Mysterious-Map-chapter-7-150x150.jpg 150w, https://www.readthetale.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/The-Mysterious-Map-chapter-7-768x768.jpg 768w, https://www.readthetale.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/The-Mysterious-Map-chapter-7.jpg 1024w" sizes="(max-width: 600px) 100vw, 600px" /></a></div>
<div class="pt-cv-content">Detective Daisy Meet Daisy, a smart and curious young girl with curly brown hair, bright green eyes, and a knack ...<br /><div class="pt-cv-rmwrap"><a href="https://www.readthetale.com/stories-for-kids/series-books/daisy" class="_self pt-cv-readmore btn btn-success cvplbd" target="_self">Read the Story Here</a></div></div><span style="color:red; font-size:16px; margin-right:5px;">❤️</span>112</div>
<div class=" pt-cv-content-item pt-cv-1-col"  data-pid="669573826251"><div class="pt-cv-meta-fields"><span class="comments-link"> <a href="https://www.readthetale.com/popular-bedtime-stories/the-bedtime-clock-that-ran-backward#comments">4 Comments<span class="screen-reader-text"> on 🌙 The Bedtime Clock That Ran Backward</span></a></span></div>
<div class="pt-cv-taxoterm above_title"><a href='https://www.readthetale.com/popular-bedtime-stories' title='Popular Bedtime Stories' class='pt-cv-tax-popular-bedtime-stories'>Popular Bedtime Stories</a></div>
<h4 class="pt-cv-title"><a href="https://www.readthetale.com/popular-bedtime-stories/the-bedtime-clock-that-ran-backward" class="_self cvplbd" target="_self" >🌙 The Bedtime Clock That Ran Backward</a></h4>
<div class="pt-cv-thumb-wrapper  "><a href="https://www.readthetale.com/popular-bedtime-stories/the-bedtime-clock-that-ran-backward" class="_self pt-cv-href-thumbnail pt-cv-thumb-default cvplbd" target="_self" ><img decoding="async" width="600" height="600" src="https://www.readthetale.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/clock-that-goes-back-600x600.png" class="pt-cv-thumbnail img-rounded" alt="The Bedtime Clock That Ran Backward" srcset="https://www.readthetale.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/clock-that-goes-back-600x600.png 600w, https://www.readthetale.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/clock-that-goes-back-150x150.png 150w" sizes="(max-width: 600px) 100vw, 600px" /></a></div>
<div class="pt-cv-content">When Emily notices her bedtime clock ticking backward, it gently shows her moments from the day she forgot—and reminds her ...<br /><div class="pt-cv-rmwrap"><a href="https://www.readthetale.com/popular-bedtime-stories/the-bedtime-clock-that-ran-backward" class="_self pt-cv-readmore btn btn-success cvplbd" target="_self">Read the Story Here</a></div></div><span style="color:red; font-size:16px; margin-right:5px;">❤️</span>76</div>
<div class=" pt-cv-content-item pt-cv-1-col"  data-pid="669573826302"><div class="pt-cv-meta-fields"><span class="comments-link"> <a href="https://www.readthetale.com/holiday-stories/easter-stories-for-kids/the-egg-that-wouldnt-hatch#comments">3 Comments<span class="screen-reader-text"> on <span style="color: red; font-weight: bold;">New! </span>The Egg That Wouldn’t Hatch</span></a></span></div>
<div class="pt-cv-taxoterm above_title"><a href='https://www.readthetale.com/holiday-stories/easter-stories-for-kids' title='Easter Stories for Kids' class='pt-cv-tax-easter-stories-for-kids'>Easter Stories for Kids</a></div>
<h4 class="pt-cv-title"><a href="https://www.readthetale.com/holiday-stories/easter-stories-for-kids/the-egg-that-wouldnt-hatch" class="_self cvplbd" target="_self" ><span style="color: red; font-weight: bold;">New! </span>The Egg That Wouldn’t Hatch</a></h4>
<div class="pt-cv-thumb-wrapper  "><a href="https://www.readthetale.com/holiday-stories/easter-stories-for-kids/the-egg-that-wouldnt-hatch" class="_self pt-cv-href-thumbnail pt-cv-thumb-default cvplbd" target="_self" ><img loading="lazy" decoding="async" width="600" height="600" src="https://www.readthetale.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/The-Egg-That-Wouldnt-Hatch-600x600.png" class="pt-cv-thumbnail img-rounded" alt="The Egg That Wouldn’t Hatch" srcset="https://www.readthetale.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/The-Egg-That-Wouldnt-Hatch-600x600.png 600w, https://www.readthetale.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/The-Egg-That-Wouldnt-Hatch-150x150.png 150w" sizes="auto, (max-width: 600px) 100vw, 600px" /></a></div>
<div class="pt-cv-content">All the Easter eggs sparkled in the morning sun — blue ones, pink ones, glittering gold ones. But near the ...<br /><div class="pt-cv-rmwrap"><a href="https://www.readthetale.com/holiday-stories/easter-stories-for-kids/the-egg-that-wouldnt-hatch" class="_self pt-cv-readmore btn btn-success cvplbd" target="_self">Read the Story Here</a></div></div><span style="color:red; font-size:16px; margin-right:5px;">❤️</span>30</div></div></div></div>			<style type="text/css" id="pt-cv-inline-style-fd3eed65al">

	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element" >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<h2 dir="ltr" style="text-align: center;"></h2>
<h1 dir="ltr" style="text-align: center;"><span style="color: #99cc00;"><u>Popular Bedtime Stories </u></span></h1>
<p style="text-align: center;"><div class="pt-cv-wrapper"><div class="pt-cv-view pt-cv-blockgrid iscvblock iscvhybrid grid1 layout1 cveffect-zoomin pt-cv-round-btn" id="pt-cv-view-ab2b9a9ikm"><div data-id="pt-cv-page-1" class="pt-cv-page" data-cvc="6"><div class=" pt-cv-content-item pt-cv-1-col"  data-pid="ad-0"><h1 style="text-align: center;"><span style="color: #0000ff;"><a style="color: #0000ff;" href="https://www.readthetale.com/rapunzel">Rapunzel by Age</a></span>
<a href="https://www.readthetale.com/rapunzel"><img decoding="async" class="aligncenter size-medium wp-image-669573823774" src="https://www.readthetale.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/10/rapunzel-for-original.jpg" alt="mars 3x3" width="" height="200" /></a></h1>
<h4 style="text-align: left;">Rapunzel by Age is a special collection where the classic fairy tale of Rapunzel is retold to suit different age groups, from toddlers to older children.</h4><span style="color:red; font-size:16px; margin-right:5px;">❤️</span>0</div>
<div class=" pt-cv-content-item pt-cv-1-col"  data-pid="1888"><div class="pt-cv-meta-fields"><span class="comments-link"> <a href="https://www.readthetale.com/popular-bedtime-stories/the-lion-king#comments">43 Comments<span class="screen-reader-text"> on The Lion King</span></a></span></div>
<h4 class="pt-cv-title"><a href="https://www.readthetale.com/popular-bedtime-stories/the-lion-king" class="_self cvplbd" target="_self" >The Lion King</a></h4>
<div class="pt-cv-thumb-wrapper  "><a href="https://www.readthetale.com/popular-bedtime-stories/the-lion-king" class="_self pt-cv-href-thumbnail pt-cv-thumb-default cvplbd" target="_self" ><img loading="lazy" decoding="async" width="300" height="234" src="https://www.readthetale.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/the-lion-king-bedtime-story2-300x234.jpg" class="pt-cv-thumbnail img-rounded" alt="the lion king bedtime story" /></a></div>
<div class="pt-cv-content">Roar into the Pride Lands with Simba in a captivating story of courage, friendship, and the circle of life ...<br /><div class="pt-cv-rmwrap"><a href="https://www.readthetale.com/popular-bedtime-stories/the-lion-king" class="_self pt-cv-readmore btn btn-success cvplbd" target="_self">Read the Story Here</a></div></div><span style="color:red; font-size:16px; margin-right:5px;">❤️</span>706</div>

<h4 class="pt-cv-title"><a href="https://www.readthetale.com/popular-bedtime-stories/the-gingerbread-man" class="_self cvplbd" target="_self" >The Gingerbread Man</a></h4>

<div class="pt-cv-content">Run as fast as you can to follow the Gingerbread Man's lively escape from hungry pursuers ...<br /><div class="pt-cv-rmwrap"><a href="https://www.readthetale.com/popular-bedtime-stories/the-gingerbread-man" class="_self pt-cv-readmore btn btn-success cvplbd" target="_self">Read the Story Here</a></div></div><span style="color:red; font-size:16px; margin-right:5px;">❤️</span>364</div>

<h4 class="pt-cv-title"><a href="https://www.readthetale.com/popular-bedtime-stories/the-three-little-pigs" class="_self cvplbd" target="_self" >The Three Little Pigs</a></h4>

<div class="pt-cv-content">Journey through houses made of straw, sticks, and bricks in this charming story of resilience against a huffing and puffing ...<br /><div class="pt-cv-rmwrap"><a href="https://www.readthetale.com/popular-bedtime-stories/the-three-little-pigs" class="_self pt-cv-readmore btn btn-success cvplbd" target="_self">Read the Story Here</a></div></div><span style="color:red; font-size:16px; margin-right:5px;">❤️</span>1016</div>

<h4 class="pt-cv-title"><a href="https://www.readthetale.com/popular-bedtime-stories/the-ugly-duckling" class="_self cvplbd" target="_self" >The Ugly Duckling</a></h4>
<div class="pt-cv-thumb-wrapper  "><a href="https://www.readthetale.com/popular-bedtime-stories/the-ugly-duckling" class="_self pt-cv-href-thumbnail pt-cv-thumb-default cvplbd" target="_self" ><img loading="lazy" decoding="async" width="300" height="221" src="https://www.readthetale.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/Bedtime-Story-The-Ugly-Duckling-1-300x221.jpg" class="pt-cv-thumbnail img-rounded" alt="duckling- no background" /></a></div>

Through ...<br /><div class="pt-cv-rmwrap"><a href="https://www.readthetale.com/popular-bedtime-stories/the-ugly-duckling" class="_self pt-cv-readmore btn btn-success cvplbd" target="_self">Read the Story Here</a></div></div><span style="color:red; font-size:16px; margin-right:5px;">❤️</span>1170</div>

<h4 class="pt-cv-title"><a href="https://www.readthetale.com/popular-bedtime-stories/rapunzel" class="_self cvplbd" target="_self" >Rapunzel Story</a></h4>
<div class="pt-cv-thumb-wrapper  "><a href="https://www.readthetale.com/popular-bedtime-stories/rapunzel" class="_self pt-cv-href-thumbnail pt-cv-thumb-default cvplbd" target="_self" ><img loading="lazy" decoding="async" width="300" height="231" src="https://www.readthetale.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/Rapunzel-bedtime-story-1-300x231.jpg" class="pt-cv-thumbnail img-rounded" alt="a cartoon of a woman and a man Rapunzel bedtime story" /></a></div>
<div class="pt-cv-content">Climb the tower alongside Rapunzel and discover her long, magical hair and the prince who longs to rescue her ...<br /><div class="pt-cv-rmwrap"><a href="https://www.readthetale.com/popular-bedtime-stories/rapunzel" class="_self pt-cv-readmore btn btn-success cvplbd" target="_self">Read the Story Here</a></div></div><span style="color:red; font-size:16px; margin-right:5px;">❤️</span>653</div>
<div class=" pt-cv-content-item pt-cv-1-col"  data-pid="1851"><div class="pt-cv-meta-fields"><span class="comments-link"> <a href="https://www.readthetale.com/popular-bedtime-stories/goldilocks-and-the-three-bears#comments">26 Comments<span class="screen-reader-text"> on Goldilocks and the Three Bears</span></a></span></div>
<h4 class="pt-cv-title"><a href="https://www.readthetale.com/popular-bedtime-stories/goldilocks-and-the-three-bears" class="_self cvplbd" target="_self" >Goldilocks and the Three Bears</a></h4>
<div class="pt-cv-thumb-wrapper  "><a href="https://www.readthetale.com/popular-bedtime-stories/goldilocks-and-the-three-bears" class="_self pt-cv-href-thumbnail pt-cv-thumb-default cvplbd" target="_self" ><img loading="lazy" decoding="async" width="300" height="300" src="https://www.readthetale.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/01/goldilocks-and-3-bears-300x300.webp" class="pt-cv-thumbnail img-rounded" alt="goldilocks and 3 bears" /></a></div>

<h4 class="pt-cv-title"><a href="https://www.readthetale.com/popular-bedtime-stories/puss-in-boots" class="_self cvplbd" target="_self" >Puss in Boots</a></h4>

<h4 class="pt-cv-title"><a href="https://www.readthetale.com/popular-bedtime-stories/snow-white" class="_self cvplbd" target="_self" >Snow White Story</a></h4>

<div class="pt-cv-content">Once upon a time, in a faraway kingdom, there was a kind and beautiful princess named Snow White. She had ...<br /><div class="pt-cv-rmwrap"><a href="https://www.readthetale.com/popular-bedtime-stories/snow-white" class="_self pt-cv-readmore btn btn-success cvplbd" target="_self">Read the Story Here</a></div></div><span style="color:red; font-size:16px; margin-right:5px;">❤️</span>588</div>

<h4 class="pt-cv-title"><a href="https://www.readthetale.com/popular-bedtime-stories/charlottes-web" class="_self cvplbd" target="_self" >Charlotte&#8217;s Web</a></h4>

		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<h2 class="CjVfdc" style="text-align: center;"><span style="color: #99cc00;"><span class="jgG6ef C9DxTc "><u>Create Personalized Bedtime Stories and Poems Here</u></span></span></h2>
<div></div>
<p style="text-align: center;"><div class="pt-cv-wrapper"><div class="pt-cv-view pt-cv-blockgrid iscvblock iscvhybrid grid1 layout1 cveffect-zoomin" id="pt-cv-view-f9cd7b4u9j"><div data-id="pt-cv-page-1" class="pt-cv-page" data-cvc="2"><div class=" pt-cv-content-item pt-cv-1-col"  data-pid="2460"><h4 class="pt-cv-title"><a href="https://www.readthetale.com/create-personalized-story/create-personalized-story-using-ai" class="_self cvplbd" target="_self" >Create Personalized Story Using AI</a></h4>
<div class="pt-cv-thumb-wrapper  "><a href="https://www.readthetale.com/create-personalized-story/create-personalized-story-using-ai" class="_self pt-cv-href-thumbnail pt-cv-thumb-default cvplbd" target="_self" ><img loading="lazy" decoding="async" width="800" height="450" src="https://www.readthetale.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/09/kid-writing-poem-800x450.jpg" class="pt-cv-thumbnail img-rounded" alt="kid writing a book" /></a></div><span style="color:red; font-size:16px; margin-right:5px;">❤️</span>159</div>
<div class=" pt-cv-content-item pt-cv-1-col"  data-pid="2871"><h4 class="pt-cv-title"><a href="https://www.readthetale.com/create-personalized-story/create-personalized-poem" class="_self cvplbd" target="_self" >Create Personalized Poem Using AI</a></h4>
<div class="pt-cv-thumb-wrapper  "><a href="https://www.readthetale.com/create-personalized-story/create-personalized-poem" class="_self pt-cv-href-thumbnail pt-cv-thumb-default cvplbd" target="_self" ><img loading="lazy" decoding="async" width="800" height="450" src="https://www.readthetale.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/09/robot-writing-poem-v2-800x450.jpg" class="pt-cv-thumbnail img-rounded" alt="robot writing" /></a></div><span style="color:red; font-size:16px; margin-right:5px;">❤️</span>136</div></div></div></div>			<style type="text/css" id="pt-cv-inline-style-394ff08s3l">
#pt-cv-view-f9cd7b4u9j .pt-cv-thumb-wrapper:not(.miniwrap) {  }#pt-cv-view-f9cd7b4u9j .pt-cv-thumbnail:not(.pt-cv-thumbnailsm) { height: 250px; }#pt-cv-view-f9cd7b4u9j > .pt-cv-page {grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);grid-gap: 15px;}
@media all and (max-width: 1024px) { 
#pt-cv-view-f9cd7b4u9j > .pt-cv-page {grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);}
} 
@media all and (max-width: 767px) { 
#pt-cv-view-f9cd7b4u9j > .pt-cv-page {grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);}
} </style>
						<style type="text/css" id="pt-cv-inline-style-7f686f34fy">#pt-cv-view-f9cd7b4u9j .pt-cv-title a, #pt-cv-view-f9cd7b4u9j  .panel-title { font-size: 30px !important; line-height: 1.3 !important; font-weight: 600 !important; display: block !important; text-align: center !important; clear: both !important; }
@media (min-width: 768px) and (max-width: 991px) {#pt-cv-view-f9cd7b4u9j .pt-cv-title a, #pt-cv-view-f9cd7b4u9j  .panel-title { font-size: 20px !important }}
@media (max-width: 767px) {#pt-cv-view-f9cd7b4u9j .pt-cv-title a, #pt-cv-view-f9cd7b4u9j  .panel-title { font-size: 18px !important }}
#pt-cv-view-f9cd7b4u9j .pt-cv-readmore  { color: #ffffff !important; background-color: #00aeef !important; }

	</div>
</div></div></div></div><div class="vc_row wpb_row vc_row-fluid"><div class="wpb_column vc_column_container vc_col-sm-12"><div class="vc_column-inner"><div class="wpb_wrapper">
<div class="vc-zigzag-wrapper zigzag11 vc-zigzag-align-center"><div class="vc-zigzag-inner" style="width: 100%;min-height: 14px;background: 0 repeat-x url(&#039;data:image/svg+xml;utf-8,%3C%3Fxml%20version%3D%221.0%22%20encoding%3D%22utf-8%22%3F%3E%3C%21DOCTYPE%20svg%20PUBLIC%20%22-%2F%2FW3C%2F%2FDTD%20SVG%201.1%2F%2FEN%22%20%22http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2FGraphics%2FSVG%2F1.1%2FDTD%2Fsvg11.dtd%22%3E%3Csvg%20width%3D%2214px%22%20height%3D%2212px%22%20viewBox%3D%220%200%2018%2015%22%20version%3D%221.1%22%20xmlns%3D%22http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg%22%20xmlns%3Axlink%3D%22http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F1999%2Fxlink%22%3E%3Cpolygon%20id%3D%22Combined-Shape%22%20fill%3D%22%23ebebeb%22%20points%3D%228.98762301%200%200%209.12771969%200%2014.519983%209%205.40479869%2018%2014.519983%2018%209.12771969%22%3E%3C%2Fpolygon%3E%3C%2Fsvg%3E&#039;);"></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class="vc_row wpb_row vc_row-fluid"><div class="wpb_column vc_column_container vc_col-sm-12"><div class="vc_column-inner"><div class="wpb_wrapper">
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element" >

			<p style="text-align: center;"><div class="pt-cv-wrapper"><div class="pt-cv-view pt-cv-blockgrid iscvblock iscvhybrid grid1 layout1 cveffect-zoomin" id="pt-cv-view-726b621yql"><div data-id="pt-cv-page-1" class="pt-cv-page" data-cvc="3"><div class=" pt-cv-content-item pt-cv-1-col"  data-pid="2824"><h4 class="pt-cv-title"><a href="https://www.readthetale.com/bedtime-stories-by-age/learning-videos-for-toddlers" class="_self cvplbd" target="_self" >Learning Videos for Kids</a></h4>

<div class="vc-zigzag-wrapper zigzag11 vc-zigzag-align-center"><div class="vc-zigzag-inner" style="width: 100%;min-height: 14px;background: 0 repeat-x url(&#039;data:image/svg+xml;utf-8,%3C%3Fxml%20version%3D%221.0%22%20encoding%3D%22utf-8%22%3F%3E%3C%21DOCTYPE%20svg%20PUBLIC%20%22-%2F%2FW3C%2F%2FDTD%20SVG%201.1%2F%2FEN%22%20%22http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2FGraphics%2FSVG%2F1.1%2FDTD%2Fsvg11.dtd%22%3E%3Csvg%20width%3D%2214px%22%20height%3D%2212px%22%20viewBox%3D%220%200%2018%2015%22%20version%3D%221.1%22%20xmlns%3D%22http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg%22%20xmlns%3Axlink%3D%22http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F1999%2Fxlink%22%3E%3Cpolygon%20id%3D%22Combined-Shape%22%20fill%3D%22%23ebebeb%22%20points%3D%228.98762301%200%200%209.12771969%200%2014.519983%209%205.40479869%2018%2014.519983%2018%209.12771969%22%3E%3C%2Fpolygon%3E%3C%2Fsvg%3E&#039;);"></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class="vc_row wpb_row vc_row-fluid"><div class="wpb_column vc_column_container vc_col-sm-12"><div class="vc_column-inner"><div class="wpb_wrapper">
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element" >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<h2></h2>
<h2 style="text-align: center;"><a style="color: #800080; text-decoration: underline;" href="/bedtime-stories-for-kids/fireplace-interview/"><br />
<span style="color: #99cc00; text-decoration: underline;"><strong>Fireplace Interviews with Your Favorite Characters</strong></span></a></h2>
<div class="pt-cv-wrapper"><div class="pt-cv-view pt-cv-blockgrid iscvblock iscvhybrid grid1 layout1 cveffect-zoomin" id="pt-cv-view-e9d1dd56bv"><div data-id="pt-cv-page-1" class="pt-cv-page" data-cvc="2"><div class=" pt-cv-content-item pt-cv-1-col"  data-pid="3303"><h4 class="pt-cv-title"><a href="https://www.readthetale.com/bedtime-stories-for-kids/fireplace-interview/interview-with-thumbelina" class="_self cvplbd" target="_self" >Interview with Thumbelina</a></h4>
<div class="pt-cv-thumb-wrapper  "><a href="https://www.readthetale.com/bedtime-stories-for-kids/fireplace-interview/interview-with-thumbelina" class="_self pt-cv-href-thumbnail pt-cv-thumb-default cvplbd" target="_self" ><img loading="lazy" decoding="async" width="1024" height="683" src="https://www.readthetale.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/Interview-with-Thumbelina-1024x683.png" class="pt-cv-thumbnail img-rounded" alt="Interview with Thumbelina" /></a></div>
<div class="pt-cv-content">﻿ Host: "Hello, dear listeners, and welcome to a very special interview today! We have the pleasure of having Thumbelina, ...<br /><div class="pt-cv-rmwrap"><a href="https://www.readthetale.com/bedtime-stories-for-kids/fireplace-interview/interview-with-thumbelina" class="_self pt-cv-readmore btn btn-success cvplbd" target="_self">Read More</a></div></div><span style="color:red; font-size:16px; margin-right:5px;">❤️</span>20</div>
<div class=" pt-cv-content-item pt-cv-1-col"  data-pid="3300"><h4 class="pt-cv-title"><a href="https://www.readthetale.com/bedtime-stories-for-kids/fireplace-interview/interview-with-snow-white" class="_self cvplbd" target="_self" >Interview with Snow White</a></h4>
<div class="pt-cv-thumb-wrapper  "><a href="https://www.readthetale.com/bedtime-stories-for-kids/fireplace-interview/interview-with-snow-white" class="_self pt-cv-href-thumbnail pt-cv-thumb-default cvplbd" target="_self" ><img loading="lazy" decoding="async" width="1024" height="585" src="https://www.readthetale.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/snow-white-interview-1024x585.webp" class="pt-cv-thumbnail img-rounded" alt="Interview with Snow White" /></a></div>
<div class="pt-cv-content">Host: "Hello, young adventurers! Today, we have a very special guest with us – the gentle and kind-hearted Snow White! ...<br /><div class="pt-cv-rmwrap"><a href="https://www.readthetale.com/bedtime-stories-for-kids/fireplace-interview/interview-with-snow-white" class="_self pt-cv-readmore btn btn-success cvplbd" target="_self">Read More</a></div></div><span style="color:red; font-size:16px; margin-right:5px;">❤️</span>38</div></div></div></div>			<style type="text/css" id="pt-cv-inline-style-8d3f872fmu">
#pt-cv-view-e9d1dd56bv .pt-cv-thumb-wrapper:not(.miniwrap) {  }#pt-cv-view-e9d1dd56bv .pt-cv-thumbnail:not(.pt-cv-thumbnailsm) { height: 300px; }#pt-cv-view-e9d1dd56bv > .pt-cv-page {grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);grid-gap: 40px;}
@media all and (max-width: 1024px) { 
#pt-cv-view-e9d1dd56bv > .pt-cv-page {grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);}
} 
@media all and (max-width: 767px) { 
#pt-cv-view-e9d1dd56bv > .pt-cv-page {grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);}
} </style>
						<style type="text/css" id="pt-cv-inline-style-f42f62e7ty">#pt-cv-view-e9d1dd56bv .pt-cv-title a, #pt-cv-view-e9d1dd56bv  .panel-title { font-weight: 600 !important; }
#pt-cv-view-e9d1dd56bv .pt-cv-content , #pt-cv-view-e9d1dd56bv  .pt-cv-content *:not(.pt-cv-readmore):not(style):not(script) { font-size: 12px !important; line-height: 1.3 !important; }
@media (min-width: 768px) and (max-width: 991px) {#pt-cv-view-e9d1dd56bv .pt-cv-content , #pt-cv-view-e9d1dd56bv  .pt-cv-content *:not(.pt-cv-readmore):not(style):not(script) { font-size: 12px !important }}
@media (max-width: 767px) {#pt-cv-view-e9d1dd56bv .pt-cv-content , #pt-cv-view-e9d1dd56bv  .pt-cv-content *:not(.pt-cv-readmore):not(style):not(script) { font-size: 12px !important }}
#pt-cv-view-e9d1dd56bv .pt-cv-readmore  { color: #ffffff !important; background-color: #00aeef !important; }

</div></div></div></div><div class="vc_row wpb_row vc_row-fluid"><div class="wpb_column vc_column_container vc_col-sm-12"><div class="vc_column-inner"><div class="wpb_wrapper">
<div class="vc-zigzag-wrapper zigzag11 vc-zigzag-align-center"><div class="vc-zigzag-inner" style="width: 100%;min-height: 14px;background: 0 repeat-x url(&#039;data:image/svg+xml;utf-8,%3C%3Fxml%20version%3D%221.0%22%20encoding%3D%22utf-8%22%3F%3E%3C%21DOCTYPE%20svg%20PUBLIC%20%22-%2F%2FW3C%2F%2FDTD%20SVG%201.1%2F%2FEN%22%20%22http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2FGraphics%2FSVG%2F1.1%2FDTD%2Fsvg11.dtd%22%3E%3Csvg%20width%3D%2214px%22%20height%3D%2212px%22%20viewBox%3D%220%200%2018%2015%22%20version%3D%221.1%22%20xmlns%3D%22http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg%22%20xmlns%3Axlink%3D%22http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F1999%2Fxlink%22%3E%3Cpolygon%20id%3D%22Combined-Shape%22%20fill%3D%22%23ebebeb%22%20points%3D%228.98762301%200%200%209.12771969%200%2014.519983%209%205.40479869%2018%2014.519983%2018%209.12771969%22%3E%3C%2Fpolygon%3E%3C%2Fsvg%3E&#039;);"></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class="vc_row wpb_row vc_row-fluid"><div class="wpb_column vc_column_container vc_col-sm-12"><div class="vc_column-inner"><div class="wpb_wrapper">
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element" >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<h1 class="CjVfdc" style="text-align: center;"></h1>
<h1 class="CjVfdc" style="text-align: center;"><span style="color: #99cc00;"><strong><span class="jgG6ef C9DxTc "><u>Recently Added Bedtime Stories</u></span></strong></span></h1>
<div class="pt-cv-wrapper"><div class="pt-cv-view pt-cv-blockgrid iscvblock iscvhybrid grid1 layout1 cveffect-zoomin pt-cv-round-btn" id="pt-cv-view-61644d6usq"><div data-id="pt-cv-page-1" class="pt-cv-page" data-cvc="6"><div class=" pt-cv-content-item pt-cv-1-col"  data-pid="669573826231"><div class="pt-cv-meta-fields"><span class="comments-link"> <a href="https://www.readthetale.com/holiday-stories/valentines-day-stories/the-heart-shaped-box-with-no-name#comments">5 Comments<span class="screen-reader-text"> on 💖 The Heart-Shaped Box with No Name</span></a></span></div>
<h4 class="pt-cv-title"><a href="https://www.readthetale.com/holiday-stories/valentines-day-stories/the-heart-shaped-box-with-no-name" class="_self cvplbd" target="_self" >💖 The Heart-Shaped Box with No Name</a></h4>
<div class="pt-cv-thumb-wrapper  "><a href="https://www.readthetale.com/holiday-stories/valentines-day-stories/the-heart-shaped-box-with-no-name" class="_self pt-cv-href-thumbnail pt-cv-thumb-default cvplbd" target="_self" ><img loading="lazy" decoding="async" width="768" height="768" src="https://www.readthetale.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/box-with-no-name-768x768.png" class="pt-cv-thumbnail img-rounded" alt="The Heart-Shaped Box" /></a></div>
<div class="pt-cv-content">On Valentine’s Day, a mysterious heart-shaped box appears in Emily’s classroom—with no name on it. Inside are kind notes that ...<br /><div class="pt-cv-rmwrap"><a href="https://www.readthetale.com/holiday-stories/valentines-day-stories/the-heart-shaped-box-with-no-name" class="_self pt-cv-readmore btn btn-success cvplbd" target="_self">Read Here</a></div></div><span style="color:red; font-size:16px; margin-right:5px;">❤️</span>42</div>
<div class=" pt-cv-content-item pt-cv-1-col"  data-pid="669573826156"><div class="pt-cv-meta-fields"><span class="comments-link"> <a href="https://www.readthetale.com/bedtime-stories-for-kids/submitted-stories/hello-i-am-cookie-a-crumbly-tale-through-time#comments">4 Comments<span class="screen-reader-text"> on Hello! I Am Cookie – A Crumbly Tale Through Time</span></a></span></div>
<h4 class="pt-cv-title"><a href="https://www.readthetale.com/bedtime-stories-for-kids/submitted-stories/hello-i-am-cookie-a-crumbly-tale-through-time" class="_self cvplbd" target="_self" >Hello! I Am Cookie – A Crumbly Tale Through Time</a></h4>
<div class="pt-cv-thumb-wrapper  "><a href="https://www.readthetale.com/bedtime-stories-for-kids/submitted-stories/hello-i-am-cookie-a-crumbly-tale-through-time" class="_self pt-cv-href-thumbnail pt-cv-thumb-default cvplbd" target="_self" ><img loading="lazy" decoding="async" width="768" height="1152" src="https://www.readthetale.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/crumbled-cookie-768x1152.png" class="pt-cv-thumbnail img-rounded" alt="I Am Cookie" /></a></div>

<h4 class="pt-cv-title"><a href="https://www.readthetale.com/bedtime-stories-for-kids/submitted-stories/pet-day" class="_self cvplbd" target="_self" >Pet Day</a></h4>
<div class="pt-cv-thumb-wrapper  "><a href="https://www.readthetale.com/bedtime-stories-for-kids/submitted-stories/pet-day" class="_self pt-cv-href-thumbnail pt-cv-thumb-default cvplbd" target="_self" ><img loading="lazy" decoding="async" width="768" height="768" src="https://www.readthetale.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/11/pet-day-768x768.webp" class="pt-cv-thumbnail img-rounded" alt="pet day" /></a></div>
<div class="pt-cv-content">by Marcia Faber Noah was very excited about going to school today. It was Pet Day in his kindergarten class, ...<br /><div class="pt-cv-rmwrap"><a href="https://www.readthetale.com/bedtime-stories-for-kids/submitted-stories/pet-day" class="_self pt-cv-readmore btn btn-success cvplbd" target="_self">Read Here</a></div></div><span style="color:red; font-size:16px; margin-right:5px;">❤️</span>19</div></div></div></div>			<style type="text/css" id="pt-cv-inline-style-6b6a74abz1">

} </style>
						<style type="text/css" id="pt-cv-inline-style-4abbf6ahz3">#pt-cv-view-61644d6usq .pt-cv-title a, #pt-cv-view-61644d6usq  .panel-title { font-weight: 600 !important; }
#pt-cv-view-61644d6usq .pt-cv-content , #pt-cv-view-61644d6usq  .pt-cv-content *:not(.pt-cv-readmore):not(style):not(script) { font-size: 12px !important; line-height: 1.3 !important; }
@media (min-width: 768px) and (max-width: 991px) {#pt-cv-view-61644d6usq .pt-cv-content , #pt-cv-view-61644d6usq  .pt-cv-content *:not(.pt-cv-readmore):not(style):not(script) { font-size: 12px !important }}
@media (max-width: 767px) {#pt-cv-view-61644d6usq .pt-cv-content , #pt-cv-view-61644d6usq  .pt-cv-content *:not(.pt-cv-readmore):not(style):not(script) { font-size: 12px !important }}
#pt-cv-view-61644d6usq .pt-cv-readmore  { color: #ffffff !important; background-color: #00aeef !important; }

#pt-cv-view-61644d6usq .img-rounded, #pt-cv-view-61644d6usq .pt-cv-hover-wrapper { -webkit-border-radius: 20px !important; -moz-border-radius: 20px !important; border-radius: 20px !important; }
#pt-cv-view-61644d6usq .pt-cv-cap-w-img { border-bottom-left-radius: 20px !important; border-bottom-right-radius: 20px !important; }</style>
			

		</div>
	</div>
</div></div></div></div><div class="vc_row wpb_row vc_row-fluid"><div class="wpb_column vc_column_container vc_col-sm-12"><div class="vc_column-inner"><div class="wpb_wrapper">

<div class="pt-cv-thumb-wrapper  "><a href="https://www.readthetale.com/poems-for-kids/cuddly-teddy-bear" class="_self pt-cv-href-thumbnail pt-cv-thumb-default cvplbd" target="_self" ><img loading="lazy" decoding="async" width="600" height="600" src="https://www.readthetale.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/teddy-cuddle-600x600.jpg" class="pt-cv-thumbnail img-rounded" alt="Cuddly Teddy Bear" /></a></div>
<div class="pt-cv-content">In a world of dreams, so soft and sweet, A cuddly teddy bear takes a seat, With fur so fluffy, ...<br /><div class="pt-cv-rmwrap"><a href="https://www.readthetale.com/poems-for-kids/cuddly-teddy-bear" class="_self pt-cv-readmore btn btn-success cvplbd" target="_self">Read More</a></div></div><span style="color:red; font-size:16px; margin-right:5px;">❤️</span>4</div>

<div class="pt-cv-content">In a world of magic, under the bed, Lives a friendly monster, not one to dread. <div class="vc-zigzag-wrapper zigzag11 vc-zigzag-align-center"><div class="vc-zigzag-inner" style="width: 100%;min-height: 14px;background: 0 repeat-x url(&#039;data:image/svg+xml;utf-8,%3C%3Fxml%20version%3D%221.0%22%20encoding%3D%22utf-8%22%3F%3E%3C%21DOCTYPE%20svg%20PUBLIC%20%22-%2F%2FW3C%2F%2FDTD%20SVG%201.1%2F%2FEN%22%20%22http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2FGraphics%2FSVG%2F1.1%2FDTD%2Fsvg11.dtd%22%3E%3Csvg%20width%3D%2214px%22%20height%3D%2212px%22%20viewBox%3D%220%200%2018%2015%22%20version%3D%221.1%22%20xmlns%3D%22http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg%22%20xmlns%3Axlink%3D%22http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F1999%2Fxlink%22%3E%3Cpolygon%20id%3D%22Combined-Shape%22%20fill%3D%22%23ebebeb%22%20points%3D%228.98762301%200%200%209.12771969%200%2014.519983%209%205.40479869%2018%2014.519983%2018%209.12771969%22%3E%3C%2Fpolygon%3E%3C%2Fsvg%3E&#039;);"></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class="vc_row wpb_row vc_row-fluid"><div class="wpb_column vc_column_container vc_col-sm-12"><div class="vc_column-inner"><div class="wpb_wrapper">
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element" >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<h1></h1>
<h1 class="CjVfdc" style="text-align: center;"><a href="/bedtime-stories-by-age/"><span class="jgG6ef C9DxTc " style="color: #99cc00;"><u>Stories by Age</u></span></a></h1>
<div class="pt-cv-wrapper"><div class="pt-cv-view pt-cv-blockgrid iscvblock iscvhybrid grid1 layout1 cveffect-zoomin" id="pt-cv-view-977d1a7eu4"><div data-id="pt-cv-page-1" class="pt-cv-page" data-cvc="4"><div class=" pt-cv-content-item pt-cv-1-col"  data-pid="3211"><h4 class="pt-cv-title"><a href="https://www.readthetale.com/stories-for-kids/by-age/bedtime-stories-for-a-3-year-old" class="_self cvplbd" target="_self" >Bedtime stories for a 3-year-old</a></h4>

			<h1 style="text-align: center;"><span style="color: #99cc00;"><a style="color: #99cc00;" href="https://www.readthetale.com/parenting-tips/behavior-discipline"><span style="color: #99cc00;">Parenting Tips</span></a></span></h1>
<div class="pt-cv-wrapper"><div class="pt-cv-view pt-cv-blockgrid iscvblock iscvhybrid grid1 layout1 cveffect-zoomin" id="pt-cv-view-4a742b4cs4"><div data-id="pt-cv-page-1" class="pt-cv-page" data-cvc="4"><div class=" pt-cv-content-item pt-cv-1-col"  data-pid="669573824443"><div class="pt-cv-taxoterm above_title"><a href='https://www.readthetale.com/parenting-tips/parenting-challenges' title='Parenting Challenges' class='pt-cv-tax-parenting-challenges'>Parenting Challenges</a></div>
<h4 class="pt-cv-title"><a href="https://www.readthetale.com/parenting-tips/parenting-challenges/overcoming-bedtime-battles" class="_self cvplbd" target="_self" >Overcoming Bedtime Battles</a></h4>

<div class="pt-cv-content">Overcoming Bedtime Battles: Creating a Calming Evening Routine For many parents, bedtime can feel like an uphill battle. <div class="pt-cv-content">Easy Ways to Incorporate More Fruits and Vegetables into Your Child’s Diet Adding more fruits and vegetables to your child’s diet can be challenging, but it’s an important step toward building lifelong healthy eating habits. <div class=" pt-cv-content-item pt-cv-1-col"  data-pid="669573824047"><div class="pt-cv-taxoterm above_title"><a href='https://www.readthetale.com/parenting-tips/health-wellbeing' title='Health &amp; Wellbeing' class='pt-cv-tax-health-wellbeing'>Health &amp; Wellbeing</a></div>
<h4 class="pt-cv-title"><a href="https://www.readthetale.com/parenting-tips/health-wellbeing/sleep-matters" class="_self cvplbd" target="_self" >Sleep Matters</a></h4>
<div class="pt-cv-thumb-wrapper  "><a href="https://www.readthetale.com/parenting-tips/health-wellbeing/sleep-matters" class="_self pt-cv-href-thumbnail pt-cv-thumb-default cvplbd" target="_self" ><img loading="lazy" decoding="async" width="300" height="300" src="https://www.readthetale.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/11/sleep-matters-300x300.jpg" class="pt-cv-thumbnail img-rounded" alt="sleep matters" /></a></div>
<div class="pt-cv-content">Sleep Matters: How to Create a Restful Bedtime Routine for Kids A consistent bedtime routine is essential for children’s physical and mental health. By creating a calm, predictable wind-down, you can help your child fall asleep more easily and stay ...<br /><div class="pt-cv-rmwrap"><a href="https://www.readthetale.com/parenting-tips/health-wellbeing/sleep-matters" class="_self pt-cv-readmore btn btn-success cvplbd" target="_self">Read Here</a></div></div><span style="color:red; font-size:16px; margin-right:5px;">❤️</span>19</div></div></div></div>			<style type="text/css" id="pt-cv-inline-style-88c4754ptz">

@media (max-width: 767px) {#pt-cv-view-4a742b4cs4 .pt-cv-content , #pt-cv-view-4a742b4cs4  .pt-cv-content *:not(.pt-cv-readmore):not(style):not(script) { font-size: 12px !important }}
#pt-cv-view-4a742b4cs4 .pt-cv-readmore  { color: #ffffff !important; background-color: #00aeef !important; }
#pt-cv-view-4a742b4cs4 .pt-cv-readmore:hover  { color: #ffffff !important; background-color: #00aeef !important; }
#pt-cv-view-4a742b4cs4 .img-rounded, #pt-cv-view-4a742b4cs4 .pt-cv-hover-wrapper { -webkit-border-radius: 19px !important; -moz-border-radius: 19px !important; border-radius: 19px !important; }
#pt-cv-view-4a742b4cs4 .pt-cv-cap-w-img { border-bottom-left-radius: 19px !important; border-bottom-right-radius: 19px !important; }</style>
			

		</div>
	</div>
</div></div></div></div><div class="vc_row wpb_row vc_row-fluid"><div class="wpb_column vc_column_container vc_col-sm-12"><div class="vc_column-inner"><div class="wpb_wrapper">
<div class="vc-zigzag-wrapper zigzag11 vc-zigzag-align-center"><div class="vc-zigzag-inner" style="width: 100%;min-height: 14px;background: 0 repeat-x url(&#039;data:image/svg+xml;utf-8,%3C%3Fxml%20version%3D%221.0%22%20encoding%3D%22utf-8%22%3F%3E%3C%21DOCTYPE%20svg%20PUBLIC%20%22-%2F%2FW3C%2F%2FDTD%20SVG%201.1%2F%2FEN%22%20%22http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2FGraphics%2FSVG%2F1.1%2FDTD%2Fsvg11.dtd%22%3E%3Csvg%20width%3D%2214px%22%20height%3D%2212px%22%20viewBox%3D%220%200%2018%2015%22%20version%3D%221.1%22%20xmlns%3D%22http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg%22%20xmlns%3Axlink%3D%22http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F1999%2Fxlink%22%3E%3Cpolygon%20id%3D%22Combined-Shape%22%20fill%3D%22%23ebebeb%22%20points%3D%228.98762301%200%200%209.12771969%200%2014.519983%209%205.40479869%2018%2014.519983%2018%209.12771969%22%3E%3C%2Fpolygon%3E%3C%2Fsvg%3E&#039;);"></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class="vc_row wpb_row vc_row-fluid"><div class="wpb_column vc_column_container vc_col-sm-12"><div class="vc_column-inner"><div class="wpb_wrapper">

			<section style="

    </p>

<script>(function(){const reviews=[{quote:"Bedtime used to feel rushed. That never happened before.",who:"Dad of a 7-year-old",icon:"❓",tint:"#f7f7ff",border:"rgba(99,102,241,.25)"},{quote:"It feels like this site was built by someone who actually has kids.",who:"Parent",icon:"💬",tint:"#fff7e0",border:"rgba(244,180,0,.35)"},{quote:"Without ads, bedtime feels calmer. My kid doesn’t get pulled out of the story.",who:"Mom of a 6-year-old",icon:"📖",tint:"#eef3ff",border:"rgba(47,91,215,.25)"},{quote:"The stories are short enough for busy nights, but still feel complete.",who:"Parent of two kids",icon:"⏰",tint:"#f0fff4",border:"rgba(34,197,94,.35)"},{quote:"This replaced screen time for us. That alone is a win.",who:"Dad of a 7-year-old",icon:"📵",tint:"#f7f7ff",border:"rgba(99,102,241,.25)"},{quote:"I like that nothing flashes or pops up. It keeps the mood peaceful.",who:"Mom of a 6-year-old",icon:"🌙",tint:"#eef3ff",border:"rgba(47,91,215,.25)"},{quote:"The ad-free experience makes it feel more like a real book than a website.",who:"Parent",icon:"📘",tint:"#fff7e0",border:"rgba(244,180,0,.35)"},{quote:"My child settles down faster now. That alone sold me.",who:"Dad of two kids",icon:"🔇",tint:"#eef3ff",border:"rgba(47,91,215,.25)"},{quote:"It doesn’t feel like a kids app trying to grab attention. It feels calm.",who:"Mom",icon:"🧘‍♀️",tint:"#f7f7ff",border:"rgba(99,102,241,.25)"},{quote:"We’ve made this part of our nightly routine. It’s simple and it works.",who:"Parent of a 6-year-old",icon:"📅",tint:"#fff7e0",border:"rgba(244,180,0,.35)"},{quote:"I didn’t realize how distracting ads were until they were gone.",who:"Parent",icon:"🚫",tint:"#eef3ff",border:"rgba(47,91,215,.25)"},{quote:"The stories feel warm, not rushed. That matters at bedtime.",who:"Mom of a 7-year-old",icon:"🔥",tint:"#f0fff4",border:"rgba(34,197,94,.35)"},{quote:"My child actually listens all the way through now.",who:"Dad of a 6-year-old",icon:"👂",tint:"#f7f7ff",border:"rgba(99,102,241,.25)"},{quote:"Ad-free makes it easier to keep bedtime calm instead of stimulating.",who:"Parent",icon:"🌙",tint:"#eef3ff",border:"rgba(47,91,215,.25)"},{quote:"This feels like something we can trust night after night.",who:"Parent of two kids",icon:"🔒",tint:"#fff7e0",border:"rgba(244,180,0,.35)"},{quote:"The tone is gentle. Even I relax while reading.",who:"Mom",icon:"😊",tint:"#f0fff4",border:"rgba(34,197,94,.35)"},{quote:"No ads, no pressure, just stories. That’s exactly what we wanted.",who:"Dad of a 7-year-old",icon:"📖",tint:"#eef3ff",border:"rgba(47,91,215,.25)"},{quote:"It doesn’t try to be flashy. It just works.",who:"Parent",icon:"✅",tint:"#f7f7ff",border:"rgba(99,102,241,.25)"},{quote:"Bedtime feels quieter now. In a good way.",who:"Parent of a 6-year-old",icon:"🌙",tint:"#fff7e0",border:"rgba(244,180,0,.35)"}];function shuffle(arr){const a=arr.slice();for(let i=a.length-1;i>0;i--){const j=Math.floor(Math.random()*(i+1));[a[i],a[j]]=[a[j],a[i]]}
return a}
const grid=document.getElementById('rtt-review-grid');if(!grid)return;const pick=shuffle(reviews).slice(0,3);grid.innerHTML=pick.map(r=>`
    <div style="
      background:#fff;
      border-radius:18px;
      padding:18px 16px;
      border:1px solid rgba(0,0,0,.08);
      box-shadow:0 10px 24px rgba(0,0,0,.06);
    ">
      <div style="
        display:flex;
        align-items:center;
        justify-content:space-between;
        gap:10px;
        margin-bottom:10px;
        flex-wrap:wrap;
      ">
        <span style="
          display:inline-flex;
          align-items:center;
          gap:8px;
          padding:6px 10px;
          border-radius:999px;
          background:${r.tint};
          border:1px solid ${r.border};
          font-size:.82rem;
          font-weight:800;
          color: rgba(0,0,0,.7);
        ">
          ${r.icon} Verified Parent
        </span>

        <span style="
          font-size:.82rem;
          font-weight:800;
          color: rgba(0,0,0,.45);
        ">
          ★★★★★
        </span>
      </div>

      <p style="
        margin:0 0 12px;
        font-size:1rem;
        line-height:1.5;
        color: rgba(0,0,0,.85);
        font-weight:600;
        white-space: normal;
        overflow-wrap: anywhere;
        word-break: break-word;
        hyphens: auto;
      ">“${r.quote}”</p>

      <div style="
        font-size:.9rem;
        color: rgba(0,0,0,.6);
        font-weight:700;
      ">${r.who}</div>
    </div>
  `).join('')})()</script>

		</div>
	</div>
</div></div></div></div>

</article>

				
			</div><!-- #content -->

			
		</div><!-- #primary -->

		
	</div><!-- #content-wrap -->

	

	</main><!-- #main -->

	
	
	
		
<footer id="footer" class="site-footer" role="contentinfo">

	
	<div id="footer-inner" class="clr">

		

<div id="footer-widgets" class="oceanwp-row clr tablet-2-col mobile-1-col">

	
	<div class="footer-widgets-inner container">

					<div class="footer-box span_1_of_4 col col-1">
				<div id="ocean_social-4" class="footer-widget widget-oceanwp-social social-widget clr"><h4 class="widget-title">Follow Us</h4>
				<ul class="oceanwp-social-icons rotate style-colored">
					<li class="oceanwp-facebook"><a href="https://www.facebook.com/readthetale/" aria-label="Facebook"  target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"><i class=" fab fa-facebook" aria-hidden="true" role="img"></i></a><span class="screen-reader-text">Opens in a new tab</span></li><li class="oceanwp-instagram"><a href="https://www.instagram.com/readthetale" aria-label="Instagram"  target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"><i class=" fab fa-instagram" aria-hidden="true" role="img"></i></a><span class="screen-reader-text">Opens in a new tab</span></li><li class="oceanwp-youtube"><a href="https://www.youtube.com/@ReadTheTale" aria-label="Youtube"  target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"><i class=" fab fa-youtube" aria-hidden="true" role="img"></i></a><span class="screen-reader-text">Opens in a new tab</span></li>				</ul>

				
			
		
			</div>			</div><!-- .footer-one-box -->

							<div class="footer-box span_1_of_4 col col-2">
									</div><!-- .footer-one-box -->
				
							<div class="footer-box span_1_of_4 col col-3 ">
					<div id="custom_html-5" class="widget_text footer-widget widget_custom_html clr"><div class="textwidget custom-html-widget"><!-- Custom Floating Subscribe Button -->
<style>
  /* Custom Subscribe Button Styles */
  .custom-footer-subscribe-button {
    position: fixed;
    bottom: 20px;
    right: 20px;
    z-index: 9999;
    text-align: center;
  }

  .custom-footer-subscribe-button a {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    text-decoration: none;
    background-color: #ff0000; /* YouTube red */
    color: #ffffff;
    padding: 10px 20px;
    border-radius: 50px;
    font-size: 16px;
    font-weight: bold;
    transition: background-color 0.3s ease;
  }

  .custom-footer-subscribe-button img {
    width: 24px;
    height: 24px;
    margin-right: 8px;
  }

  .custom-footer-subscribe-button a:hover {
    background-color: #cc0000; /* Darker red on hover */
  }

  /* Make sure the button looks good on mobile */
  @media (max-width: 600px) {
    .custom-footer-subscribe-button a {
      padding: 8px 16px;
      font-size: 14px;
    }

    .custom-footer-subscribe-button img {
      width: 20px;
      height: 20px;
    }
  }
</style>

<div id="subscribeButton" class="custom-footer-subscribe-button" style="display: none;">
	<a href="https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC1Q6so--BV-o9AwxVzpdt1A?sub_confirmation=1" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" onclick="setSubscribedCookie()">
	<img src="https://readthetale.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/09/cropped-Bedtime-Story-The-Ugly-Duckling-favicon-no-background.png" alt="Subscribe to our YouTube Channel" />
	<span>Subscribe to Our YouTube</span>
	</a>
</div>

<script>function setSubscribedCookie(){var expires=new Date();expires.setTime(expires.getTime()+(365*24*60*60*1000));document.cookie="subscribed=true; expires="+expires.toUTCString()+"; path=/"}
function checkSubscribedCookie(){var subscribed=document.cookie.split('; ').find(row=>row.startsWith('subscribed='));return subscribed?!0:!1}
window.onload=function(){if(!checkSubscribedCookie()){document.getElementById('subscribeButton').style.display='block'}}</script></div></div>				</div><!-- .footer-one-box -->
				
							<div class="footer-box span_1_of_4 col col-4">
									</div><!-- .footer-box -->
				
			
	</div><!-- .container -->

	
</div><!-- #footer-widgets -->

	<div id="footer-bottom-inner" class="container clr">

	<script data-optimized="1" type="text/javascript">document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded",function(){document.body.addEventListener('click',function(event){var target=event.target;while(target&&target!==document.body){if(target.matches('.download-app-link a')){event.preventDefault();redirectToAppStore();break}
target=target.parentElement}});function redirectToAppStore(){var userAgent=navigator.userAgent||navigator.vendor||window.opera;if(/iPad|iPhone|iPod/.test(userAgent)&&!window.MSStream){window.location.href='https://apps.apple.com/us/app/read-the-tale/id6480067191'}else if(/Silk/.test(userAgent)){window.location.href='https://www.amazon.com/gp/product/B0CZ663RSD'}else if(/android/i.test(userAgent)){window.location.href='https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.gmail.aramulka1.readthetale'}else{window.location.href='https://readthetale.com/download-our-app'}}})</script>

  /* Ensure the cursor is a pointer for the "Download App" menu item */
  .download-app-link a {
      cursor: pointer;
